subject:
Continuous generation of STAR files during subtomo
 extraction/reconstruction + re-starting an aborted extraction
body:
hi Dmitry & the community 

Like a greedy child, I have a wishlist for the amazing WARP/M. 

WARP sometimes crashes, gets stuck during the long process of sub-tomogram 
extraction/reconstruction. Sometimes I wait a few hrs for the extraction 
only for the program to crash or get stuck, needing another round of 
extraction from scratch. Sometimes, the extraction is nearly 100% complete, 
but then WARP gets stuck.

Here's the wishlist:

[1] It would be very nice if the WARP can continuously write out the STAR 
file during the extraction/reconstruction. Because even a significant 
fraction of exported particles can be used for further refinement. 

[2] The previously aborted/failed/stuck extraction can be re-started from 
the middle (& not from scratch). 

Thanks & cheers,
Digvijay
